vocab.meaning: một thành tựu đáng tự hào
vocab.example: For many successful entrepreneurs, owning a Patek Philippe is seen as a feather in their cap, symbolizing a major career milestone.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc cực kỳ sang trọng, chỉnh chu
vocab.example: When celebrities are dressed to the nines for a gala, a luxury watch is the final touch that completes their sophisticated look.

vocab.meaning: đua đòi, cố gắng bằng bạn bằng bè (về vật chất)
vocab.example: Some people purchase high-end timepieces simply to keep up with the Joneses and maintain a certain social image in their wealthy neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: đáng đến từng đồng (xứng đáng với số tiền bỏ ra)
vocab.example: True collectors believe a handcrafted Swiss watch is worth every penny due to its longevity and the skill required to assemble it.

vocab.word: separate the wheat from the chaff
vocab.meaning: phân biệt người/vật có giá trị với những thứ tầm thường
vocab.example: In the world of horology, a true luxury movement helps separate the wheat from the chaff when compared to mass-produced quartz watches.

vocab.meaning: chủ đề bàn tán sôi nổi của mọi người
vocab.example: A rare, custom-made watch can easily make a person the talk of the town at high-profile social gatherings.

vocab.meaning: chi rất nhiều tiền (thường là làm cạn kiệt ngân sách)
vocab.example: While most wouldn't dream of it, some are willing to break the bank to acquire a vintage Rolex that is expected to triple in value.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ sang trọng, chất lượng hoàng gia
vocab.example: The materials used in elite watches, such as platinum and rare jewels, make them pieces that are truly fit for a king.

vocab.meaning: trở nên nổi bật, khác biệt với đám đông
vocab.example: Many wear expensive, uniquely designed watches because they have a desire to stand out from the crowd and express their individuality.

vocab.word: an old head on young shoulders
vocab.meaning: người trẻ nhưng có tư duy/sở thích chín chắn (như người già)
vocab.example: Young collectors who appreciate vintage pocket watches often show they have an old head on young shoulders by valuing history over modern trends.
